description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled sandals from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair is a perfect part wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Upper Leather footbed with thread deatiling, leather forefoot and midfoot criss-cross straps with a colourful textile upper and backfoot holder with a velvet outer for absolute comfort and style Zipper closure at the back leg to offer a customised Fit Outsole Non-slip outsole with grooves on the forefoot and heel patch, and has a textured toe region for absolute grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
